shopHome.emptyState: Coming soon — your dashboard will fill up as you place orders.

adminHome.title: Admin dashboard
adminHome.quickActionsSubtitle: Jump straight to the most-used parts of the admin panel.
adminHome.emptyState: No data yet — start by adding products and shopkeepers.

shopkeepers.title: Shopkeepers
shopkeepers.subtitle: Create, view, and manage shopkeeper accounts.
shopkeepers.empty: No shopkeepers yet. Create your first one.
shopkeepers.newSubtitle: Account is created with the phone number as the initial password. The shopkeeper is asked to change it on first login.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage the catalog of shoes, clothing, and other items shopkeepers can order.
products.empty: No products yet. Add your first one.
products.newSubtitle: Create the product. Add variants (colours) and set types (size combinations) on the next page.
products.editSubtitle: Update product details, variants, and set types.

form.name: Product name
form.suggestedRetailHint: Suggestion shown to shopkeepers in their POS. They can override.

variants.title: Variants
variants.subtitle: Different colours or styles of this product.
variants.empty: No variants yet. Add the first colour or style after creating the product.
variants.setsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no sets} one {# set} other {# sets}}

setTypes.title: Set types
setTypes.subtitle: Each set type defines a fixed size combination sold as one unit.
setTypes.comingSoon: Add / edit set types — coming next.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top shopkeepers buying from Himova. Earn badges and rewards every month.
leaderboard.emptyHint: Once shopkeepers place orders, the leaderboard will fill in.

photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: Multiple angles help shopkeepers and customers see the product clearly. The first photo is shown as the main thumbnail.
photos.dropzoneHint: JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF — up to 5 MB each
photos.selectedCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 file selected} other {# files selected}}
photos.uploadedCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 photo uploaded} other {# photos uploaded}}

comingSoon.ordersAdminBody: All shopkeeper orders, filterable by status and date, with shipping/payment controls.
comingSoon.stockAdminBody: Current set stock with manual restock and low-stock alerts.
comingSoon.leaderboardAdminBody: Private admin view with extra columns and the reward-cycle picker.
comingSoon.reportsAdminBody: Sales, top products, top shopkeepers, profit, outstanding payments, geographic heatmap. Excel and PDF export.
comingSoon.settingsAdminBody: Brand, payment methods, notification templates, tax, and team management.
comingSoon.catalogShopBody: Browse products from Himova. Search, filter, see new arrivals and best sellers.
comingSoon.cartShopBody: Review your selected sets, apply your shopkeeper price, and place an order.
comingSoon.ordersShopBody: Track every order from Himova: pending, packed, shipped, delivered.
comingSoon.stockShopBody: Per-size inventory, low-stock alerts, and a one-tap re-order button.
comingSoon.posShopBody: Sell single pairs to your customers. WhatsApp receipts, split payments, exchange-only policy.
comingSoon.customersShopBody: Your own customer database, built from POS sales.
comingSoon.reportsShopBody: Daily and monthly sales, profit, bestsellers, focus suggestions. Export to Excel/PDF.
comingSoon.settingsShopBody: Branches, language, password, and printing preferences.

landing.heroTitle: Wholesale ordering and a free POS, built for Nepal.
landing.heroSubtitle: Order shoes and clothing in sets, track every sale, and grow with your shop on a single platform.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From your first order to your hundredth — Himova grows with you.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign in with the phone number Himova set up for you and start ordering today.
landing.featureOrderBody: Browse the catalog, place orders, and track delivery from your phone.
landing.featurePosBody: Sell single pairs to your customers with built-in payments and receipts.
landing.featureLeaderboardBody: Compete with other shopkeepers and earn rewards every month.

auth.loginSubtitle: Pick your account type to continue.
auth.phoneHint: First-time login: your password is your phone number.
auth.needHelp: Need help? Message us on WhatsApp.
auth.welcomeBody: Please change your password to continue.
